title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 20 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 20 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 20 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/04/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.62% today, the main contract closed at 761.5.The traders' willingness to ship is better.The steel mills are active topurchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is better.PBF at Shandong port deal 874 yuan/mt,decrease 15yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port deal 905yuan/mt,decrease 7-12yuan/mt. Today's market is still shrouded in pessimistic expectations that the National Development and Reform Commission will closely monitor the dynamics of the iron ore market, and the iron ore futures market will weaken again.
